troparion: (Tone 3) Since our sins have risen up against us,* rise up, O Lord, and come to our aid;* for You are our Father, and we know no other but You.
prokimenon: Your altars, O Lord of hosts,
How beloved are Your dwellings, O Lord of hosts!
second_prokimenon: Show us, O Lord, Your mercy
You have shown favour to Your land, O Lord; You brought back the captives of Jacob.
